title: [BUG] Cell value comes as a Date where number should be
author: alinakuchai-ideals
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Lib version: latest

Please check out why in this file cell A84 value comes as a Date when in excel file it's a number

[CellFormatting.xlsx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19088229/CellFormatting.xlsx)
